title: Fanatic's PvP Club Party Manager
description: Fanatic's PvP Club Party Manager adds useful utilities for hosting parties on mcpvp.club.
body:
**Fanatic's PvP Club Party Manager is a helpful mod that lets you manage parties on mcpvp.club with ease.**

![An image of Fanatic's PvP Club Party Manager's main GUI](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8770d262ffcc75798d6ef1109fb2d23a56af82f4.png)

Sick of dealing with toxic players in your parties all the time? Fanatic's PvP Club Party Manager solves that. You can have members of your party vote on whether to kick someone if they are doing something wrong, like saying profanities, or just being a sore loser. 

If you don't want that person to come back, just blacklist them in the Player Blacklist menu. When you blacklist a user, they can never join your parties again, unless you remove them from the Player Blacklist menu.

# 📁 Installation:
Fanatic's PvP Club Party Manager is primarily developed on Fabric, however NeoForge also has support.

Simply copy and paste the mod into your mods folder, or install it via the [Modrinth App](https://modrinth.com/app).

Once done, open Minecraft and press ' when logged on to mcpvp.club. You should see the main GUI pop-up.

(Note: You can change ' to another bind in Options > Controls > Keybinds...)

**Features:**

- Run vote kicks so other members of your party can vote on whether to kick players.

- Start polls to decide what kit to play next, or to ask random questions.

- Setup preset messages for easy text pasting.

- Blacklist unwanted players to prevent them from joining, even if you start a new party.

- Easy Hosting for non VIP+ users to host with ease.
